build_sh_sanitizer:
set -e
mkdir -p build-asan && cd build-asan
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DGGML_SANITIZE_ADDRESS=ON -DGGML_SANITIZE_UNDEFINED=ON -DGGML_CUDA=OFF -DGGML_METAL=OFF -DGGML_VULKAN=OFF -DGGML_OPENMP=OFF -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DWHISPER_BUILD_TESTS=OFF
cmake --build . --target whisper-cli -j$(nproc)
build_sh_cov:
set -e
mkdir -p build-cov && cd build-cov
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DGGML_CUDA=OFF -DGGML_METAL=OFF -DGGML_VULKAN=OFF -DGGML_OPENMP=OFF -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DWHISPER_BUILD_TESTS=OFF
cmake --build . --target whisper-cli -j$(nproc)
validation_notes: no public PoC and no specific fix_commit recorded. yaml describes a 'fixed-size stack-allocated samples slice buffer' but the current whisper_full_parallel uses std::vector<float> + pointer arithmetic — code has been refactored since the report. Trigger requires a >30 min audio file plus specific -p / segment_size that produces an int overflow in the n_samples_per_processor computation; not synthesised here. Env builds fine via build_sh_sanitizer (master).
